meta.title: appelsin — live event photos
meta.description: Guests scan a QR code, upload photos from their phone, and the photos appear live on the big screen.

hero.subhead: Guests scan a QR code and upload photos straight from their phone — no app. All photos are gathered in one place, and you download the whole party afterwards.

steps.title: Scan the code
steps.desc: Guests scan the QR code with their phone camera. No app, no login.

steps.title: Upload a photo
steps.desc: They pick a photo straight from the phone.

steps.title: Live on the screen
steps.desc: The photo appears on the photo wall instantly, so everyone can follow along.

pricing.heading: One price per event
pricing.subhead: Pick a plan for the day. No subscriptions, no surprises.
pricing.footnote: All plans include the QR pack, live photo wall, moderation and EU hosting.

free.tagline: Try Appelsin.io for a smaller event — no card required.
features: Download all photos after the party

basic.tagline: Perfect for weddings, birthdays and smaller parties.
features: Customise event title and text colour
Download all photos after the party

gold.tagline: For big parties, long nights and lots of guests.
features: Customise event title and text colour
Download all photos after the party

items.q: Do my guests need to download an app?
items.a: No. Guests scan the QR code with their phone's camera and upload directly in the browser. No app, no account.

items.q: What happens if we hit the photo limit?
items.a: New uploads are blocked once the limit is reached. You can delete rejected photos to free up slots, or upgrade the event to a bigger plan. Free is meant for testing — choose Basic or Gold for the party itself.

items.q: What happens to the photos after the event?
items.a: The event is automatically marked as ended 2 days after the event date. You and your guests (who provided an email) receive a link to the photo collection by email. Photos are then stored for 7-30 days depending on the plan, after which everything is deleted automatically.

items.q: Can I show the photo wall on an iPad or computer?
items.a: Yes. The photo wall is just a URL — open it in a browser on a big screen, iPad, laptop, or projector. Photos update live as guests upload.

items.q: Can I delete a photo that shouldn't be shown?
items.a: Yes. You can delete individual photos from the event dashboard — they disappear from the photo wall instantly and aren't included in the final photo collection.

The upload window opens 24 hours before the event date, so anyone scanning the QR the night before can get going. The event stays live until 2 days after the event date, so the latest photos from the night and the day after are included too.
All photos are hosted on Cloudflare's EU infrastructure. We don't sell your data or use it for anything other than showing and delivering the photos during the agreed storage period.
